texto: Crying is like a thundershower for the soul. The air feels so wonderful after the rain. Don’t think too much. Breathe. Don’t be harsh or demanding on yourself. Just experience your feelings and know that your tears are announcing change in your life. Change is coming
autor: like a summer rain — to wash away your pain. Have faith that things are getting better.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a like a summer rain — to wash away your pain. Have faith that things are getting better.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Crying is like a thundershower for the soul. The air feels so wonderful after the rain. Don’t thi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, bryant-mcgill, change pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e dia-chuvoso.
